creator: @bechardgrave
transcript: Low calorie Pizza Hut order hack. Did you guys know that a large cheese pizza from Pizza Hut is 2,368 calories? Neither did I. Anyway, this is what I got. Calories are on the screen and all the ordering details are in the caption below.
caption: Low Calorie Pizza Hut Order. Did you know a large cheese pizza is 2368 calories?! This hack: 1 x Personal Pan Americano + 1 x Regular Chips. Total Calories: 695.
ocr_summary: Shows Pizza Hut storefront, online ordering screen, food arriving. Final calorie overlay shows 386 CALORIES (pizza) and 309 CALORIES (chips).
visual_scenes: Nighttime Pizza Hut exterior, screen recording of online ordering, then food reveal with calorie overlays. Closeup of pizza slice with fries.
